content:
I have successfully completed the implementation of the dynamic invoice settings:

### Summary of Changes

1. **Database Migration & Seeding**:
   - Created the migration file [20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/migrations/20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql) to add the `invoice_settings` column to `one_rupee_poojas`, `general_poojas`, and `website_pooja_products`.
   - Seeded the default global invoice configuration row under key `'global_invoice_settings'` in the `website_settings` table.

2. **Admin Panel Improvements**:
   - **Global**: Added the **Invoice Settings** tab inside [App.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/App.jsx) to manage default GST rates, discount rates, and delivery parameters globally.
   - **Overrides**: Implemented **Invoice Settings** override forms inside [OneRupeeManagerPage.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/OneRupeeManagerPage.jsx), [GeneralPoojasManagerPage.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/GeneralPoojasManagerPage.jsx), and [WebsiteProductsManagerPage.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/WebsiteProductsManagerPage.jsx).

3. **Mobile Checkout Logic (`app`)**:
   - Updated [CartContext.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/context/CartContext.tsx) to query and cache the new `invoice_settings` column dynamically.
   - Refactored [cart.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/cart.tsx) to apply item-specific discount rates, compute GST amounts dynamically, determine deliverability thresholds dynamically, and record the correct prices in the database during order checkout.

For the full breakdown of modifications and testing verification results, please refer to the updated [walkthrough.md](file:///Users/sahilpatel/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/904ec316-0b09-4127-bc3f-4ffce23dd778/walkthrough.md).

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Please execute the SQL script in [20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/migrations/20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql) inside your Supabase Dashboard SQL Editor to create the necessary override columns on the production database.
